_instructions.critical: Only modify 'passes' field. Never change structure.
_instructions.workflow: One task at a time. Full verification. Commit after each.

meta.title: Portfolio-AI React Compiler Errors + Unused Variables Cleanup

targets.SettingsModal.tsx: 2 setState in effect errors - use lazy initialization
targets.ChatPanel.tsx: 6 errors - forward reference, render-time objects, mutable refs
targets.useStatusStream.ts: 1 setState in effect - derive state instead

steps: Line 82: Replace useState(DEFAULT_SETTINGS) with useState(() => loadSettings())
Remove the useEffect that calls setSettings(loadSettings()) at line 80-83
Line 267 (useAgentSettings hook): Same fix - lazy initialization
Keep the storage listener effect but remove the initial setSettings call
Verify: npm run lint shows fewer errors
Rename connectionState to internalConnectionState (exclude 'fallback' type)
Derive connectionState: useFallback ? 'fallback' : internalConnectionState
Remove the sync effect at lines 57-61
Update all setConnectionState calls to setInternalConnectionState
Verify: npm run lint shows fewer errors
Line 140: setTimeout(connect, 3000) references connect before declaration
Move the connect useCallback definition BEFORE the ws.onclose that uses it
Or wrap in arrow function: setTimeout(() => connect(), 3000)
Verify: npm run lint shows fewer errors
Capture timestamp BEFORE state updates: const now = new Date()
Line 165: Use pre-computed timestamp in message object
Line 194: Deep copy toolInput: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(msg.toolInput))
Verify all setState calls use immutable/pre-computed values
Verify: npm run lint shows fewer errors
Line 460: Remove unused getDiskStatusVariant function
Verify the actual lint errors at lines 90, 115, 288
If setState in effect: apply same lazy initialization pattern
Verify: npm run lint shows fewer errors
tasks.note: Original errors were misidentified - only warning for unused function

phases.name: Final Verification
phases.goal: All checks pass, error count reduced

steps: Run: cd frontend && npm run build
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint 2>&1 | grep -c 'error' (expect <5)
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest tests/ -x --tb=short -q
Verify: bash ~/portfolio-ai/scripts/restart.sh succeeds
Verify: curl -sf http://localhost:8000/api/health returns healthy
